textContent.title:
Hi, I'm
<highlight>Mikołaj Pęcak</highlight>
textContent.text:
I'm a programmer with 7 years of commercial experience. I primarily develop in the direction of <bold>creating frontend layers of web applications</bold> and mobile apps. I passionately pursue my interests while being the owner of my own brand <itpulse>IT Pulse</itpulse>, under which I establish freelance collaborations and more.

Thanks to my work ethic and determination acquired during many years of sports career, I make rapid progress <bold>in every activity I undertake</bold>. By achieving the milestones I set for myself, I become a better programmer and a <bold>trustworthy entrepreneur</bold> with each passing day. I believe that hard work pays off, and small steps lead to spectacular results.

Feel free to get to know me on this website and on my <linkedin>LinkedIn</linkedin> profile.

work.title: Collaboration
work.text: I am currently available for freelance work or other forms of collaboration

header.title: Curriculum Vitae
header.description: Overview of my professional experience, skills, and education.

experience.mugDescription:
- Development and maintenance of React-based frontend applications for clients including Volkswagen Financial Services Polska, Toyota Financial Services Polska, and Semilac.
- Designing and implementing production views, components, and user flows in line with business requirements.
- Managing the frontend team within the project, supporting junior team members, and participating in recruitment.
- Collaborating with the backend on REST API integration, data handling, and optimizing communication between application layers.
- Co-creating design systems, working with Material UI, Styled Components, Storybook, and UX/UI designers.
- Modernizing legacy code, participating in code review, and maintaining consistent code quality standards.
- Optimizing application performance, working on responsiveness, interface accessibility, and solution stability.
- Active participation in sprint planning, estimations, daily standups, retrospectives, and working in the Agile methodology.
experience.moodUpDescription:
- Creating and developing mobile applications for iOS within an international project team.
- Collaborating with UX/UI designers, participating in code review, and integrating applications with REST API.
experience.amoDescription:
- Collaborating with drivers during karting competitions.
- Analyzing telemetry data.
- Preparing race strategy.
- Providing technical support to the team.
- Working as a mentor and trainer for young athletes.
experience.itpulseDescription:
- Building and developing web applications and full-stack solutions tailored to clients' needs.
- Designing interfaces in React and TypeScript with an emphasis on readability, responsiveness, and code maintainability.
- Integrating applications with REST API and Firebase.
experience.ekDescription: - Entering company inventory into the online store and assisting with inventory management.
experience.ibDescription:
- Customer service in mobile phone repair.
- Phone and email contact with customers.
- Resolving customers' ongoing issues.
- Assistance in the accounting department.
- Managing company's Facebook profile.

activities.cdv2: Assistance in creating a startup web application project using Ruby on Rails and Angular2 technologies
activities.al:
- Member of Automobilklub Leszczyński
- Member of the National Karting Team from 2005 to 2010

pageContent.title: Portfolio
pageContent.text: Here you can find some of my projects

item.privateRepository: Production project. The repository is private.
item.pingletDescription: Instant push alerts for your AI automations. Connect Make.com, n8n, Zapier, or any tool that can send HTTP requests. Pinglet delivers notifications straight to your phone — no app store required.
item.moodTrackerDescription: Mood Tracker is a web application that allows you to track your mood and your mood history.
item.cardDescription: A quick bluff-and-guess card game you can play with friends in the same room or online.
item.pagerDescription: Pager is a PWA web application, using Push Notifications to send notifications about new messages.
item.dilemmaDescription: A party game where you together answer difficult moral questions using a smartphone as a controller.
item.walkieTalkieDescription: A PWA web application that allows you to make voice calls using WebRTC.
